name: slack
description: Send messages, read channels, and search Slack from TulipFarm agents.

required_env.name: SLACK_BOT_TOKEN
required_env.label: Bot Token
required_env.description: xoxb-... token from your Slack app (OAuth & Permissions → Bot Token Scopes).

required_env.name: SLACK_TEAM_ID
required_env.label: Team ID
required_env.description: Your Slack workspace ID (Settings & administration → Workspace settings → shown in the URL as T...).
